summary: Tested new features: Stock price refresh (mock data), Lifecycle Planning (retirement/estate/goals), AI Financial Advisor chatbot (demo mode). All 17 backend tests pass, all frontend features working correctly.

minor.issue: ai_enabled field returned None instead of False when no LLM key configured - FIXED by adding bool() wrapper

passed_tests: Backend: /api/health - Health check passes
Backend: /api/stocks/get-prices - Returns mock prices for valid ASX symbols (CBA, BHP, CSL, etc.)
Backend: /api/stocks/get-prices - Handles unknown symbols with error response
Backend: /api/stocks/get-prices - Mixed valid/invalid symbols handled correctly
Backend: /api/lifecycle/retirement-plan - Calculates retirement projections correctly
Backend: /api/lifecycle/retirement-plan - Young person scenario works
Backend: /api/lifecycle/estate-plan - Analyzes estate with beneficiaries and tax implications
Backend: /api/lifecycle/estate-plan - No will generates critical recommendation
Backend: /api/lifecycle/goal-planning - Analyzes multiple goals with progress tracking
Backend: /api/lifecycle/goal-planning - Insufficient savings generates budget recommendation
Backend: /api/chat/financial-advisor - Returns pre-defined responses in demo mode
Backend: /api/chat/financial-advisor - Tax question returns correct 2024-25 rates
Backend: /api/chat/financial-advisor - Super question returns contribution info
Backend: /api/chat/financial-advisor - Property question returns investment info
Backend: /api/chat/financial-advisor - Conversation ID maintained across messages
Backend: /api/property/get-valuations - Returns mock valuations for Sydney suburbs
Backend: /api/property/suburb-data - Returns suburb median data
Frontend: Share Portfolio page loads with Refresh Prices button
Frontend: Refresh Prices updates stock prices with mock data
Frontend: Demo Mode badge and 'Simulated prices' indicator visible after refresh
Frontend: Lifecycle Planning page loads with 3 tabs (Retirement, Estate, Goals)
Frontend: Retirement tab - Calculate Plan shows projection chart and recommendations
Frontend: Estate tab - Analyze Estate shows checklist and beneficiary analysis
Frontend: Goals tab - Analyze Goals shows summary and goal status
Frontend: AI Financial Advisor page loads with Demo Mode badge
Frontend: Chat input and send button work correctly
Frontend: Suggestion buttons trigger appropriate responses
Frontend: Quick Topics sidebar and disclaimer present
Frontend: New Conversation button resets chat
Frontend: Navigation sidebar shows AI Advisor under Overview and Lifecycle Planning under Planning
critical_code_review_comments: Minor fix applied: Changed 'has_ai = openai_key or anthropic_key or emergent_key' to 'has_ai = bool(openai_key or anthropic_key or emergent_key)' in /api/chat/financial-advisor endpoint to ensure boolean return value
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 2795 - added bool() wrapper for ai_enabled field)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses localStorage and default values from App.js PortfolioContext
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested new features added in this iteration: 1) Stock price refresh on /share-portfolio uses MOCK DATA (Alpha Vantage not integrated - user has no key), 2) Lifecycle Planning at /lifecycle-planning has 3 tabs (Retirement, Estate, Goals) all working with backend APIs, 3) AI Financial Advisor at /financial-advisor uses PRE-DEFINED RESPONSES (Demo Mode - no LLM key). All APIs return mock data as expected. Navigation links correctly placed in sidebar.

mocked_apis.note: ALL NEW FEATURES USE MOCK DATA
list: /api/stocks/get-prices - Returns simulated ASX stock prices (no Alpha Vantage key)

Estate tab with checklist and beneficiary analysis
